Band a · Mid price & depth within ±5 bps

Mid = (best_bid+best_ask)/2 (left). Shaded = USD notional within ±5bps of mid, bids up / asks down (right). Out-of-session time is gray-filled and blanked; distributions & percentiles use in-session data only.

Band b · Mid price & depth within ±10 bps

Mid = (best_bid+best_ask)/2 (left). Shaded = USD notional within ±10bps of mid, bids up / asks down (right). Out-of-session time is gray-filled and blanked; distributions & percentiles use in-session data only.

Band c · Mid price & depth within ±20 bps

Mid = (best_bid+best_ask)/2 (left). Shaded = USD notional within ±20bps of mid, bids up / asks down (right). Out-of-session time is gray-filled and blanked; distributions & percentiles use in-session data only.

Band d · Mid price & depth within ±50 bps

Mid = (best_bid+best_ask)/2 (left). Shaded = USD notional within ±50bps of mid, bids up / asks down (right). Out-of-session time is gray-filled and blanked; distributions & percentiles use in-session data only. The ±50bps band reaches past the 20 captured levels 8% of in-session time (lower bound there).

Band e · Mid price & depth within ±100 bps

Mid = (best_bid+best_ask)/2 (left). Shaded = USD notional within ±100bps of mid, bids up / asks down (right). Out-of-session time is gray-filled and blanked; distributions & percentiles use in-session data only. The ±100bps band reaches past the 20 captured levels 54% of in-session time (lower bound there).

Bid side — cumulative depth by level

Each row a level (0 = best bid); color = cumulative k-USD notional to that level (log). Out-of-session columns grayed.

Ask side — cumulative depth by level

Each row a level (0 = best ask); color = cumulative k-USD notional to that level (log). Out-of-session columns grayed.

Resting depth by price (combined map)

y = price, color = resting k-USD notional per price bin (log), mid in white. In-session time only.
